Brand new '24 GLC300 4MATIC.  Engine light came on with no error message.  Brought it in for service.  Miscellaneous engine repair states:  "Found current code POA7F00 in drivetrain control unit.  Followed LI54.10-P-077250.  Cleared codes.  Drained 48V battery to below 25% SOC.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Mercedes-Benz Glc owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 28 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (29% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
